fact_nuggets.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Magic Powder changes the target's type to pure Psychic . The effect lasts as long as the target remains in battle; however, changing form , transforming or Terastallizing overrides the effect. Magic Powder fails if the target has a substitute , is already a pure Psychic type, is Terastallized, or its Ability is RKS System . Being a powder move, it fails on Grass-type Pokemon, Pokemon with the Ability Overcoat , or holding Safety Goggles . Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokemon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl [ edit | edit source ] Magic Powder cannot be selected in a battle.
